zh.lifeSummary: 當Vicomte Alain II de Rohan於大約1110年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，他的父親Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan30歲，母親Villana de Castille26歲。他去世於1169年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vicomte Alain II de Rohan于大约1110年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰时，他的父亲Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan30岁，母亲Villana de Castille26岁。他去世于1169年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Vicomte Alain II de Rohan was born about 1110, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan, was 30 and his mother, Villana de Castille, was 26. He died in 1169, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vicomte Alain II de Rohan est né environ 1110, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Villana de Castille, avait 26 ans. Il est décédé en 1169, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vicomte Alain II de Rohan um 1110 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan 30 und seine Mutter Villana de Castille 26. Er starb 1169 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte Alain II de Rohan è nato il circa 1110 nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Villana de Castille, aveva 26 anni. Morì nel 1169, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Vicomte Alain II de Rohanが約1110年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで生まれた時，父Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohanは30歳，母Villana de Castilleは26歳であった。彼は1169年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Vicomte Alain II de Rohan(이)가 대략 1110년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Villana de Castille(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1169년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-: Richmond, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vicomte Alain II de Rohan nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Villana de Castille, tinha 26 anos. Ele faleceu em 1169, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vicomte Alain II de Rohan родился около 1110 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Villana de Castille, 26. Он умер в 1169 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.from 1168 to 1195: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1195

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vicomte Alain II de Rohan nació aproximadamente 1110, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Vicomte Alain I "Le Noir" de Porhoët de Rohan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Villana de Castille, tenía 26 años. Murió en 1169, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
